heading.title: Chronic Diseases
heading.subtitle: Please indicate whether you suffer from any of the following medical conditions and provide details where applicable.

blood_pressure.label: Do you suffer from blood pressure problems?
blood_pressure.description: Select “Yes“ if you have high or low blood pressure, then provide details in the field below.

blood_pressure_details.label: Blood Pressure Details
blood_pressure_details.description: Please specify whether you have high or low blood pressure and describe any treatment or medical follow-up you are receiving.

diabetes.label: Do you suffer from diabetes?
diabetes.description: Select “Yes“ if you have diabetes, then provide details about the condition.

diabetes_details.label: Diabetes Details
diabetes_details.description: Please specify the type of diabetes (Type 1 or Type 2) and indicate whether you regularly use insulin or any other medication.

heart_disease.label: Do you suffer from heart disease?
heart_disease.description: Select “Yes“ if you have any heart-related condition.

heart_disease_details.label: Heart Disease Details
heart_disease_details.description: Please describe the type of heart condition if any (such as heart muscle weakness or arrhythmia) and the treatment you are currently using.

immune_diseases.label: Do you suffer from immune system diseases?
immune_diseases.description: Select “Yes“ if you have any immune-related disease.

immune_diseases_details.label: Immune Disease Details
immune_diseases_details.description: Please mention the name of the immune disease (such as lupus, rheumatoid arthritis, or others) and describe the treatment or medical follow-up.

mental_health.label: Do you suffer from psychological or mental health conditions?
mental_health.description: Select “Yes“ if you have any psychological or mental health condition.

mental_health_details.label: Mental Health Details
mental_health_details.description: Please indicate whether you are receiving psychological treatment or regular follow-up, and describe the nature of the condition if you wish.

other_diseases.label: Do you suffer from any other medical conditions?
other_diseases.description: Select “Yes“ if you have any other health conditions not mentioned above.

other_diseases_details.label: Other Health Conditions
other_diseases_details.description: Please add any other medical condition not listed above, along with its details or medications you are using.

heading.title: Behavioral and Social Aspects
heading.subtitle: Please answer the following questions to help us better understand your social behavior and daily lifestyle.

adapt_to_new_environments.label: Do you find it difficult to adapt to strangers or new environments?
adapt_to_new_environments.description: Select “Yes” if you usually feel uncomfortable or anxious when meeting new people or being in unfamiliar places.

prefer_solitude.label: Do you prefer solitude and spending time alone?
prefer_solitude.description: Select “Yes” if you generally prefer being alone rather than socializing with others.

behavioral_problems.label: Have you ever been involved in fights or behavioral problems?
behavioral_problems.description: Select “Yes” if you have had any history of aggressive behavior or disciplinary issues.

suspension_history.label: Have you ever been suspended or warned at any stage of your education?
suspension_history.description: Select “Yes” if you have received any formal warnings or suspensions during your academic life.

shared_room_adaptation.label: Can you cope well in a shared room with other students?
shared_room_adaptation.description: Select “Yes” if you are comfortable living and sharing personal space with others.

social_support.label: Do you have close friends or a social support network?
social_support.description: Select “Yes” if you have close friends or people you can rely on for emotional or social support.

stimulants_or_sedatives.label: Do you rely on any type of stimulants or sedatives?
stimulants_or_sedatives.description: Select “Yes” if you regularly use substances such as caffeine pills, energy drugs, sleeping pills, or similar medications.

social_media_usage.label: Do you use social media for more than 5 hours a day?
social_media_usage.description: Select “Yes” if your daily usage of social media platforms exceeds five hours.

heading.title: Mood and Psychological Assessment
heading.subtitle: Please select the option that best describes your condition for each question.

sadness_without_reason.label: Do you feel sad or depressed without a clear reason?
sadness_without_reason.description: Please choose the option that best describes how you have been feeling recently.

anxiety_or_stress.label: Do you feel anxious or excessively stressed?
anxiety_or_stress.description: Select how often you experience anxiety or stress in your daily life.

concentration_difficulty.label: Do you have difficulty concentrating or making decisions?
concentration_difficulty.description: Indicate how much this affects your daily or academic performance.

sleep_problems.label: Do you suffer from sleep problems (insomnia / nightmares / excessive sleep)?
sleep_problems.description: Choose the answer that best reflects your condition during the past weeks.

loss_of_interest.label: Have you lost interest in activities you previously enjoyed?
loss_of_interest.description: Please indicate how often you experience this feeling.

self_harm_thoughts.label: Have you ever thought about harming yourself or others?
self_harm_thoughts.description: This question is important for accurately assessing your mental health, and your answer will remain confidential.

appetite_changes.label: Do you notice significant changes in your appetite (increase / decrease)?
appetite_changes.description: Select how often these changes occur.

anger_outbursts.label: Do you experience anger outbursts or unexplained irritability?
anger_outbursts.description: Indicate how frequently this happens recently.

heading.title: Medical Treatment
heading.subtitle: Please specify any medications or medical treatments taken regularly, along with the related health condition.

receiving_treatment.label: Are you currently receiving medical treatment?
receiving_treatment.description: Select “Yes“ if you are currently undergoing any regular medical treatment, then provide details about the type of treatment and the reason for taking it in the field below.

receiving_treatment_details.label: Treatment Details
receiving_treatment_details.description: Please specify the name of the treatment, the reason for taking it, and the dosage if possible. Also indicate whether the treatment is ongoing or temporary.

allergies.label: Do you have any allergies to certain medications or foods?
allergies.description: Select “Yes” if you have any kind of allergy to medications or foods, then provide the details in the following field.

allergies_details.label: Allergy Details
allergies_details.description: Please mention the type of allergy, the name of the medication or food causing it, and the nature of the symptoms you experience when exposed.

mental_health_treatment.label: Have you ever received mental health treatment?
mental_health_treatment.description: Select “Yes” if you have undergone any form of mental health treatment, counseling, or therapy, then provide the details in the following field.

mental_health_treatment_details.label: Treatment Details
mental_health_treatment_details.placeholder: Enter details about your mental health treatment here
mental_health_treatment_details.description: Please mention the type of treatment, the reason for it, and any relevant details about your experience or duration.

heading.title: Special Needs
heading.subtitle: Please indicate whether the student has special needs and provide details about the type of disability or required support, if applicable.

special_needs.label: Do you have special needs?
special_needs.description: Select “Yes“ if you have special needs, then specify the type of condition in the field below.

special_needs_details.label: Specify the type of disability or special condition
special_needs_details.description: Please describe the type of disability or special condition in detail, including any required accommodations or support needed during accommodation or study.
